concerns.detail: Unsupported character judgment labeling the student as an ungrateful 'snake' and using derogatory slang '小黑子' (hater/troll)
concerns.excerpt: 上面负面评价纯小黑子...农夫与蛇的故事科研版，老师尽力帮助，学生反咬一口

concerns.detail: Personal insults questioning mental state ('你是不是魔怔了') and calling a group member a toxic '毒瘤' (cancer)
concerns.excerpt: 你是不是魔怔了...组里有一个毒瘤而已

concerns.detail: Deletion of substantive entry about HKU professor Chao Huang regarding GitHub star purchasing allegations, suppressing legitimate observation
concerns.excerpt:
HKU, Chao Huang
买github star是真的吗？
